brief:
Competitor activity is currently moderate. Finance offers and seasonal promotions remain the main themes to monitor. No single signal currently requires an immediate national response, but commercial teams should watch for repeated discounting across multiple dealers or brands.

Recommended action: review dealer-level retail performance before matching competitor offers, and separate national campaigns from local dealer discounting.
scope: Yamaha WaveRunner promotions and finance offers
Kawasaki Jet Ski campaigns and cashback
Polaris and Can-Am recreational vehicle offers

signals.title: WaveRunner finance and seasonal promotion activity
signals.assessment: Potential pressure on premium retail conversion

signals.title: Jet Ski promotional activity and dealer offers
Marine and powersports retail campaign activity
